heading: How AI Background Removal Works
text: Modern background removal tools use deep learning models that have been trained on millions of images to distinguish foreground subjects from backgrounds. These neural networks analyze the image to identify edges, depth cues, and contextual information to create precise cutout masks.

heading: Common Use Cases
text: E-commerce product photography is one of the most popular applications. Clean white or transparent backgrounds are standard for marketplaces like Amazon, eBay, and Shopify stores. Instead of setting up a professional photo studio, sellers can photograph products against any background and remove it digitally.

heading: Tips for Best Results
text: The quality of your results depends partly on the input image. Photos with good contrast between the subject and background produce the cleanest cutouts. Well-lit images with sharp focus give the AI model clear edges to work with.

heading: Using ToolPic for Background Removal
text: Open the Remove Background tool on ToolPic and upload your image. The AI model loads in your browser on first use, which takes a few seconds. After that, processing is nearly instant for subsequent images.
